providers.name: Stitch
providers.status_note: Google Labs — 'not officially supported'; pin the package. Free tier; drive via the existing mcp_enabled + STITCH_API_KEY (aios/.env). Emits a portable design export (DESIGN.md-style).

providers.name: Claude Design
providers.status_note: Interactive claude.ai (Pro/Max/Team/Enterprise). Outbound-export only; CONSUMES a design system, does not emit one; NOT automatable. Use it to explore a look, then describe/paste the result back into the interview.

providers.name: Bring your own
providers.status_note: Any tool (Figma export, a hand-authored file, the next tool). Its output is distilled into wiki/design-system.md the same way — the format is the contract, not the vendor.
